summary: Frontend testing complete for 'The Becoming' landing page. All requested features tested and working correctly. CTA buttons display 'Enter The Becoming', questionnaire modal works with full navigation (Begin, Continue, Back, Close), smooth scroll navigation functions properly, FAQ accordion opens/closes, footer links work, and logo variants display correctly (white on dark backgrounds, dark on light backgrounds).

passed: Page loads successfully with landing-page data-testid
Hero section displays with correct text 'You've been waiting for this'
Nav CTA button shows 'Enter The Becoming'
Hero CTA button shows 'Enter The Becoming'
Bottom section CTA button shows 'Enter The Becoming'
All 3 CTA buttons open questionnaire modal correctly
Questionnaire modal has 18 steps (1/18 indicator visible)
Begin button in questionnaire works
Continue button navigates to next step
Back button returns to previous step
Close (X) button closes questionnaire modal
Smooth scroll navigation - About section
Smooth scroll navigation - Experience section
Smooth scroll navigation - Journey section
FAQ accordion opens on click
FAQ accordion closes on second click
Footer navigation links work (About, Experience, Journey)
Footer email link present (hello@thebecoming.in)
Footer Techbook Technologies link present
Logo displays white version on dark backgrounds (hero, questionnaire, footer)
Logo displays dark version on light backgrounds (scrolled header, CTA section)
Header transitions from transparent to cream background on scroll
Animations are present (Framer Motion scroll reveals, floating elements)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All CTA buttons say 'Enter The Becoming', questionnaire has 18 steps with various question types (text, single select, multi-select, textarea, contact info). Logo uses two separate image files: logo-white.png for dark backgrounds and logo-dark.png for light backgrounds. The /api/signup endpoint is MOCKED and may not persist data to database.

mocked_apis_list: /api/signup - may not fully persist questionnaire submissions
